auth.resetError: We couldn't update your password. The link may have expired — request a new one.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the login page.

import.title: Import members
import.subtitle: Bulk-load members from a spreadsheet — including lapsed ex-members for win-back. Imported members are profile-only: no membership, no billing.
import.step1_help: Fill it in Excel. Arabic and English names are both supported. Keep the column order; the header row and the example row are ignored on import.
import.step2_help: Parsed in your browser — nothing is sent until you review the preview and press Import.
import.blocked_by_errors: Fix or exclude the error rows before importing.

colhelp.phone: Required — the duplicate key. Any format (03…, +961…)
colhelp.guardian_phone: Optional — links an existing guardian by phone, or creates one
colhelp.status: active or lapsed (default lapsed) — affects the member list only, never billing

reason.duplicate_in_file: same phone appears earlier in the file

errors.parse_failed: Couldn't read that file — use the .xlsx template
errors.empty_file: No rows found in that file
errors.unauthenticated: You are signed out — sign in again
errors.not_allowed: Only an owner or receptionist can import members
errors.too_many_rows: Too many rows — split the file (max 1000)

gym.interfaceLanguageHint: This device only — sets your display language, not a gym-wide default.

gym.publicHint: Contact, socials and map shown on your public landing page. Leave a field empty to hide it.

gym.mapParseError: Couldn't read coordinates from that link — enter the latitude and longitude below.
gym.hoursEnable: Show opening hours on the landing page
gym.hoursHint: When off, the default hours block is shown.
gym.billingIntro: Choose when your members' monthly bills land. This is a gym-wide setting.
gym.calendarTitle: Everyone bills on the same day of the month
gym.calendarBody: Every member's bill lands on the same date, whichever day they joined.
gym.calendarExample: Someone joining on 17 January pays only for the rest of January — a part-month charge — then a full month on 1 February, 1 March, and so on.
gym.anniversaryTitle: Each member bills from their own join date
gym.anniversaryBody: A member's billing date is the day they started, and it stays there.
gym.anniversaryExample: Someone joining on 17 January pays a full month now, then is billed again on 17 February, 17 March, and so on.
gym.cycleDayHint: 1 to 28, so the date exists in every month.
gym.switchNote: Changing this affects members registered from now on. Members who are already registered keep the billing dates they have today — nothing is rewritten.

discipline.iconHint: Optional — shown on the schedule, class picker and public page

tmpl.renewal: Hi {name}, this is {gym} — a friendly reminder that your membership is due for renewal. Reply here to arrange it. Thank you! 💪
tmpl.winback: Hi {name}, we miss you at {gym}! Come back for a session — reply here and we will sort you out.
tmpl.receipt: Hi {name}, your receipt from {gym} — invoice {number} · {label}: ${usd}{lbp}. Paid {date}. Balance: ${balance}. Thank you!
tmpl.invoiceDue: Hi {name}, this is {gym}. Invoice {number} · {label} — amount due: ${usd}{lbp}. You can view and pay it here: {link}. Thank you!
tmpl.invoiceReminder: Hi {name}, a gentle reminder from {gym}: invoice {number} · {label} still has ${usd}{lbp} outstanding. View it here whenever suits you: {link}. Thank you! 🙏
tmpl.leadReply: Hi {name}, this is {gym} replying about your interest. Want to book a free trial? Just reply here! 🥊
tmpl.regApproved: Hi {name}, your registration for {class} at {gym} is confirmed! See you in class 💪

whatsappSettings.title: WhatsApp
whatsappSettings.explainer: Until WhatsApp is active, reminders use the green share-to-WhatsApp buttons (they open your own WhatsApp). Once you add Cloud-API credentials, the same reminders auto-send.
whatsappSettings.tokenNote: The access token is encrypted and never shown again.

waiver.agree: I have read and agree to the waiver.

waiverSettings.title: Liability waiver
waiverSettings.explainer: The waiver members sign at onboarding. Editing the body bumps the version and asks members to re-sign.
waiverSettings.bodyHint: The text members read and agree to before signing.
waiverSettings.activeLabel: Active (members are asked to sign this waiver)
waiverSettings.bumpNote: Editing the body bumps the version — existing signatures become outdated and members are asked to re-sign.

offline.paymentsNeedConnection: Payments need a connection — only attendance works offline.
offline.savedOffline: Saved offline — will sync when you reconnect
offline.scope: Front desk works offline — attendance, cash, leads. Everything else needs a connection.

push.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad, add this app to your Home Screen first (Share → Add to Home Screen), then turn on notifications.
push.denied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings. Allow them there to turn this on.
push.promptBody: Get alerted about activity, reminders and billing on this device.

pwa.installDescription: Add to your device for offline access at the front desk.
pwa.offlineDescription: Changes will sync when you reconnect.
pwa.cardDescription: Install {gym} on this device for a faster, offline-ready front desk.
pwa.alreadyInstalledHint: Already installed? You can dismiss this.

macSafari.title: Add {gym} to your Dock (Safari)
macSafari.s1: Open the File menu — or the Share button — in Safari.

chromiumDesktop.title: Install from the address bar (Chrome / Edge)
chromiumDesktop.s1: Click the install icon (⊕) at the right of the address bar.
chromiumDesktop.s2: Or open the ⋮ menu and choose “Install {gym}”.

coachEdit.title: Edit my public profile
coachEdit.note: Your changes are saved as a draft and go live only after an admin publishes them.
coachEdit.photoHint: Upload a headshot — it goes live only after an admin publishes it.

desk.title: Front Desk · Offline
desk.noCache: No cached data yet — Sync now while online
desk.noResults: No matching member in the cache
desk.fileNeedsConnection: Full file + edits need a connection
desk.willQueueOffline: Offline — this payment will queue and sync on reconnect
desk.discardReasonRequired: A reason is required to discard.
desk.captureLeadHint: Record a walk-in even while offline.

meta.title: Praxella — Run your gym or studio, all in one platform
meta.description: Praxella is the Arabic-first platform to run your gym: memberships, classes, PT, dual-currency billing, WhatsApp, an offline front desk, leads and more.

hero.name: Gym 360 Pro
hero.tagline: Run your gym, not your spreadsheets
hero.subtitle: Memberships, classes, PT, dual-currency billing, WhatsApp, an offline front desk and more — Arabic-first, and built for how gyms in the region really operate.

features.title: Everything your gym runs on
features.subtitle: Nine pillars, one platform — built for how gyms in the region actually operate.

scheduling.title: Class scheduling
scheduling.desc: Recurring weekly classes with rooms and coaches, in a live timetable members read at a glance.

attendance.title: Attendance tracking
attendance.desc: Fast check-in that keeps working offline, with per-class and per-member history.

belts.title: Belt & rank progression
belts.desc: Track every discipline's ranks and promote students with a full belt history.

billing.title: Dual-currency billing
billing.desc: Every invoice in USD and LBP with the exchange rate on record — no more spreadsheets.

pt.title: PT packages
pt.desc: Sell and track personal-training packages by session count and validity.

camps.title: Camps & seasons
camps.desc: Publish seasonal camps with ages, capacity and a live spots-left counter.

leads.title: Lead pipeline
leads.desc: Capture trial requests and move prospects from first inquiry to active member.

offline.title: Offline-first PWA
offline.desc: Installable on any device and built to keep working when the connection doesn't.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp built in
whatsapp.desc: Reach members where they already are — reminders and invites over WhatsApp.

who.title: Built for your gym
who.subtitle: Purpose-built for the region — not a generic tool bent to fit.

martial.title: Martial-arts & boutique gyms
martial.desc: Belts, disciplines, camps and PT — the way combat-sport and boutique studios really run.

mena.title: Made for MENA
mena.desc: Dual-currency money and cash-first, reference-based payments — no card gateway required.

arabic.title: Arabic-first
arabic.desc: A true right-to-left Arabic interface, with English and French built in.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your gym.
pricing.placeholder: Placeholder pricing — final tiers and amounts to be confirmed.
pricing.note: Every plan is white-label — your gym's name, logo and colors throughout.

starter.name: Starter
starter.tagline: For a single studio getting started

cta.title: Bring your gym online
cta.subtitle: See Gym 360 Pro running on your own gym's data in a personal walkthrough.

footer.tagline: The white-label platform for martial-arts & boutique gyms.

console.title: Praxella — Vendor Console
console.suspendBody: Suspending hides {gym}'s public website — its landing page and public catalog stop showing to visitors. Staff can still log in and use the app; nothing is deleted.
console.reactivateBody: Reactivating restores {gym}'s public website (landing page + catalog).
console.suspendFailed: Couldn't update the gym. Please try again.
console.resetPwBody: This issues a NEW temporary password for {gym}'s owner. Their current password stops working immediately, and they'll be asked to choose a new one when they sign in.
console.resetPwDoneWarn: Copy it now — this is the only time it will be shown.
console.resetPwDoneHint: Give it to {name} directly. They'll set their own password when they sign in.
console.errNoOwner: {gym} has no active owner account, so there is nothing to reset.
console.errMultipleOwners: {gym} has more than one owner. Resetting would mean guessing which one — resolve that first.
console.errOwnerNoAccount: {gym}'s owner has no login yet. Invite them instead of resetting.
console.errOwnerChanged: The owner changed while you were confirming. Nothing was reset — please try again.
console.errResetFailed: Couldn't reset the password. Please try again.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From sign-up to your front desk in days, not months.

step1.title: Tell us about your gym
step1.desc: Request a demo and we set up your gym — disciplines, classes, plans and branding.

step2.title: Add your members & schedule
step2.desc: Import members, build your weekly timetable, and configure billing in your currencies.

step3.title: Go live
step3.desc: Open your front desk, publish your landing page, and start taking attendance and payments.

demo.title: See Praxella on your gym
demo.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll set up a personal walkthrough on your own gym's data.
demo.fillAll: Please add your name and phone.
demo.submitFailed: Couldn't send that. Please try again.
demo.tooMany: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
demo.noPromise: We'll reach out to schedule your walkthrough. No commitment.
demo.thanksBody: We've received your request and will contact you shortly to set up your demo.

requests.title: Demo requests
requests.subtitle: Prospects who asked for a Praxella walkthrough.
requests.updateFailed: Couldn't update the request. Please try again.

hero.sub: Praxella runs everything a class-driven business lives on — signups, session schedules, capacity, coach calendars, personal training and billing — in one Arabic-first platform that keeps working when the internet doesn't.

ops.sub: Signups, schedules, capacity, coaches and PT don't live in separate apps — in a gym they're one flow. Praxella models that flow end to end, so nothing falls between a WhatsApp message and an Excel tab again.

s1.p: Walk-ins, website requests and referrals land in one pipeline. Approve a request and Praxella registers the member, bills the class and puts them on the roster — one motion, nothing forgotten.
s1.t1: Public "request to join" straight from your landing page
s1.t2: Approve → registered → invoiced, in a single flow
s1.t3: Family accounts: one parent, all the kids

s2.p: The timetable is the source of truth: recurring classes with rooms and coaches, live capacity on every session, and a per-coach board that makes double-booking impossible to miss. Change a class once — members, coaches and the front desk all see it.
s2.t1: Live "spots left" on every session — full is full
s2.t2: Coach calendars: classes and PT on the same lane
s2.t3: Completeness checks: no class goes live without a schedule, coach and fee

s3.p: Sell a package once — Praxella counts every session against it, books slots on the coach's real availability, and tells you when a member is due for renewal instead of letting the last session quietly slip by.
s3.t1: Packages by session count and validity window
s3.t2: Slots come from the coach board — no clashes with classes
s3.t3: Renewal surfaced before the package runs dry
s3.viz_t: PT · Ali Mansour with Coach Sami
s3.foot: Struck-through slots are Sami's classes — PT can't collide with them.

portals.sub: The front desk stops being a call center. Members see their schedule, progress and balance; coaches run their sessions from the mat — both installable on any phone, no app store.
portals.member_p: Next class, rank progress, balance — and a paid-up member never has to ask.
portals.coach_p: Today's sessions and one-tap check-in — attendance that works offline, mid-class.

region.sub: Praxella was built in Lebanon, for how gyms here actually run: Arabic on the glass, two currencies in the ledger, WhatsApp in the pocket — and a front desk that doesn't stop when the power or the internet does.
region.ar_p: A real right-to-left interface designed in Arabic — not translated into it — with English and French one tap away.
region.ar_aria: Arabic headline: your platform, in your language
region.fx_p: Every amount in USD and LBP with the exchange rate stamped on the invoice. Cash, OMT or Whish — recorded by reference, no card gateway required.
region.fx_aria: An invoice line shown in both USD and LBP
region.wa_p: Reminders and invites where members already are — and a front desk that keeps checking people in with zero internet, then syncs itself.
region.wa_aria: A WhatsApp reminder conversation, with an offline badge

wl.sub: Praxella stays backstage. Your gym gets its own landing page, colors and logo — live at yourgym.praxella.com the day you sign up, and on your own domain when you’re ready.
wl.b1_aria: A martial-arts gym's branded landing page on its praxella.com subdomain
wl.b2_aria: A dance studio's branded landing page on its own custom domain

publish.title: Publish & go live
publish.subtitle: Choose what shows on your public website, then share the link.
publish.classesHint: Turn a class on to show it in your public schedule.
publish.coachesHint: Turn a coach on to show them on your public website.
publish.campsHint: Choose which camps appear on your public page.
